shortAnswer: Antinuclear antibodies target components of the cell nucleus and are an important screening test when autoimmune diseases like lupus are suspected. A positive value alone is not a diagnosis, since ANA can also be detectable in many healthy people and other conditions.
metaDescription: ANA (antinuclear antibodies) positive? Meaning for autoimmune diseases explained.
causesElevated: Can also occur in healthy people at low titer
doctorQuestions: What is my ANA titer and which pattern was found?
Are further specific antibody tests necessary?
